creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Sun Mar 24 14:23:56 2013
New Revision: 315123
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315123

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.13
  - Use more appropriate option name EXAMPLES in place of NLS
  - Use space in WWW line
  
  PR:		ports/176711
  Submitted by:	Myself
  Approved by:	Maintainer timeout (18 days)

Modified:
  head/www/yii/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/yii/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/yii/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/yii/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/yii/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/yii/Makefile	Sun Mar 24 14:19:44 2013	(r315122)
+++ head/www/yii/Makefile	Sun Mar 24 14:23:56 2013	(r315123)
@@ -2,8 +2,8 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	yii
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.9
-DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	.r3527
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.13
+DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	.e9e4a0
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE \
 		SF
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ IGNORE_WITH_PHP=	4
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	MYSQL PGSQL SQLITE REQPHP DOCS NLS
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	MYSQL PGSQL SQLITE REQPHP DOCS EXAMPLES
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	REQPHP
 REQPHP_DESC=	PHP dependencies required by plugins
 
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ do-install:
 	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${FIND} ${DATADIR} -type d -print0 | \
 		${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755' >> ${TMPPLIST}
 	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/framework/yiic ${PREFIX}/bin
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "demos requirements" ${EXAMPLESDIR})
 	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} \

+SIZE (yii-1.1.13.e9e4a0.tar.gz) = 4044292

 flexible and extensible.

+WWW: http://www.yiiframework.com/
